3.contents37: If the player's first two cards total 8 or 9 points, and the player wins, the player who bets on the "player card" will be rewarded.

3.contents42: If the player's first card has a higher value than the banker's first card (10, J, Q, and K are 10, 11, 12, and 13 points respectively), the tiger wins;
3.contents43: The first card of the banker and player has the same points (10, J, Q, and K are 10, 11, 12, and 13 points respectively), which is the sum of dragon and tiger.

2001.title: "2 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 2 events.
2001.content: When selecting 2 events for 2 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 2 events into a single bet. Both events must win for the bet to be profitable.

3001.title: 3 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 3 events.
3001.content: When selecting 3 events for 3 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 3 events into a single bet. All 3 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

3004.title: 3 parlay 4 = Four separate bets, each consisting of 3 events.
3004.content: "When choosing to bet on a 3 parlay 4, the system will create four separate bets from the selected 3 events. It will generate three 2 parlay 1 and one 3 parlay 1. Each combination of events in the parlay is treated as a single bet, resulting in a total of four separate bets.

4001.title: 4 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 4 events.
4001.content: When selecting 4 events for 4 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 4 events into a single bet. All 4 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

5001.title: 5 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 5 events.
5001.content: When selecting 5 events for 5 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 5 events into a single bet. All 5 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

6001.title: 6 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 6 events.
6001.content: When selecting 6 events for  6 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 6 events into a single bet. All 6 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

7001.title: 7 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 7 events.
7001.content: When selecting 7 events for a 7 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 7 events into a single bet. All 7 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

8001.title: 8 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 8 events.
8001.content: When selecting 8 events for an 8 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 8 events into a single bet. All 8 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

9001.title: 9 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 9 events.
9001.content: When selecting 9 events for a 9 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 9 events into a single bet. All 9 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

10001.title: 10 parlay 1 = A bet consisting of 10 events.
10001.content: When selecting 10 events for a 10 parlay 1, the system will combine the chosen 10 events into a single bet. All 10 events must win for the bet to be profitable.

40011.title: "4 parlay 11 = 11 distinct bets from the selection of 4 events.
40011.content: when choosing 4 matches to bet on 4 parlay 11 system. The system will split the 4 selected matches into 6 x 2 parlay 1, 4 x 3 parlay 1 and 1 x 4 parlay 1. Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 11 bets.

50026.title: 5 parlay26 = 26 distinct bets from the selection of 5 events.
50026.content: When choosing 5 matches to bet on 5 parlay 26 system. The system will split the 5 selected matches into 10 x 2 parlay 1, 10 x  3 parlay 1 , 5 x 4 parlay 1 and 1 x 5 parlay 1. Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 26 bets.

60057.title: 6 parlay 57 = 57 distinct bets from the selection of 6 events.
60057.content: When choosing 6 matches to bet on 6 parlay 57 system. The system will split the 6 selected matches into 15 x 2 parlay 1, 20 x  3 parlay 1 , 15 x 4 parlay 1 ,6  x 5 parlay 1 and 1 x 6 parlay 1. Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 57 bets.

700120.title: 7 parlay 120 =  120 distinct bets from the selection of 7 events.
700120.content: When choosing 7 matches to bet on 7 parlay 120 system. The system will split the 7 selected matches into 21 x 2 parlay 1, 35 x  3 parlay 1 , 35 x 4 parlay 1 ,21  x 5 parlay 1 , 7 x 6 parlay 1 and 1 x  7 parlay 1.Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 120 bets.

800247.title: 8 parlay 247 =  247 distinct bets from the selection of 8 events.
800247.content: When choosing 8 matches to bet on 8 parlay 247 system. The system will split the 8 selected matches into 28 x 2 parlay 1, 56 x  3 parlay 1 , 70 x 4 parlay 1 ,56  x 5 parlay 1 , 28 x 6 parlay 1 , 8  x  7 parlay 1 and 1 x 8 parlay 1  .Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 247 bets.

900502.title: 9 parlay 502 =  502 distinct bets from the selection of 9 events.
900502.content: When choosing 9 matches to bet on 9 parlay 502 system. The system will split the 9 selected matches into 36 x 2 parlay 1, 84 x  3 parlay 1 , 126 x 4 parlay 1 ,126  x 5 parlay 1 , 84 x 6 parlay 1 , 36  x  7 parlay 1 , 9 x 8 parlay 1 and 1 x 9 parlay 1 .Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 502 bets.

10001013.title: 10 parlay 1013 =  1013 distinct bets from the selection of 10 events.
10001013.content: When choosing 10 matches to bet on 10 parlay 1013 system. The system will split the 10 selected matches into 45 x 2 parlay 1, 120 x  3 parlay 1 , 210 x 4 parlay 1 ,252  x 5 parlay 1 , 210 x 6 parlay 1 , 120  x  7 parlay 1 , 45 x 8 parlay 1 , 10  x 9 parlay 1 and 1 x 10 parlay 1.Each combination forms a separate bet, resulting in a total of 1013 bets.

bet.odd_bet1: 1.Tick this feature: For all bets added to this option, the bet can be automatically processed regardless of whether the adjusted odds are higher or lower than the original return value.
bet.odd_bet2: If this feature is not selected: For all bets added to this option, the bet can be automatically processed if the odds offered at the time of selection are higher than the original return value. If the adjusted odds are lower than the original return value, the bet will not be automatically processed.
bet.odd_bet3: 1.'Accept Better Odds': For all bets added to this option, the bet can be automatically processed if the odds offered at the time of selection are higher than the original return value. If the adjusted odds are lower than the original return value, the bet will not be automatically processed.
bet.odd_bet4: 2.'Accept Any Odds': For all bets added to this option, the bet can be automatically processed regardless of whether the adjusted odds are higher or lower than the original return value.
bet.odd_bet5: 3.'Do Not Accept Any Odds Changes: For all bets added to this option, if there is any change in the odds, the bet will not be automatically processed.

analysis_football_matches.league_rules_title2:
League Rules

In a double round-robin home and away format, the team that ranks first at the end of the season will be crowned champion; the bottom two teams will be relegated, and the top two teams will be directly promoted. The third-to-last team will play a playoff with the third-placed team from the lower league, with the winner remaining in the current league.
analysis_football_matches.cup_rules_title2:
1、The competition includes group stage, round of 16, quarter-finals, semi-finals, third-place play-off, and the final;
2、Except for the group stage, all other rounds are knockout rounds. If no winner is determined, both teams must play an extra time of two 15-minute halves. The team with more goals in extra time wins. If still tied, a penalty shootout will decide the winner.
analysis_football_matches.remark: Here the odds are Euro-compensated, and there is no switching linkage.

bet.set_to_cash_out: Auto Cash Out value set to {num}
bet.tips_message_1: 1. Once successful bet, users can schedule an auto cash out.
bet.tips_message_2: 2. When the user's reached designated auto cash out amount, the system will settle in advance with the specified amount.
bet.tips_message_3: 3. Once the appointment for auto cash out is set, users can remove the setting at any time before triggering the auto cash out.
bet.tips_message_4: 4. After removing the setting, users can set schedule for auto cash out again.
bet.tips_message_5: 5. For bets with auto cash out schedule, users can still manually settle them in advance.
bet.tips_message_6: 6. After manually settling in advance, if there is no remaining stake, the scheduled auto cash out for that bet is automatically invalidated.
bet.tips_message_7: 7. After manually settling in advance, if there is still remaining stake, the scheduled auto cah out for that bet is automatically invalidated. Users can use the remaining amount to set a new scheduled auto cash out.

rules.rule1: 1 All live content shown in this page is for reference only. Members may also use this content as a guide. We will do our best to ensure that the content displayed is correct and the company will not take any responsibility. for any errors.
rules.rule2: 2 For a live score, such as handicap, the correct score shown on the betting slip at the time of placing the bet will prevail.

play_way_info.2: 1X2 and Total Goals only based on first 5 round goals in penalty shoot-out. Sudden death stage (Sixth round onwards) is not included.
play_way_info.5: Booking markets are settled on a points system. Red Cards equal 2 points, while Yellow Cards equal 1 point. The maximum points any player can accumulate is 3.
play_way_info.6: Market consist of Home or Away total corners, Who will race to X first.

video.msg: All live broadcast content displayed on this page is only for reference, and members can also use this content as a guide. We will do our best to ensure that the displayed content is correct. If there are errors, the company will not take any responsibility. For in-play scores, such as in-play handicap, the correct score shown in the betting slip at the time of the bet will prevail.

cerocup.tip_more: Note: Click on the score area to view the complete score.
cerocup.rules_con: The Champions League main game is divided into group stage, 1/8 finals, 1/4 finals, semi-finals and finals. The group stage is divided into 8 groups, with 4 teams in each group. Each team will play two home and away matches with the other three opponents in the same group. The top two in the group advance to the Champions League 1/8 finals, and the third place in the group will advance to the Champions League 1/8 finals. Participate in the UEFA Europa League knockout playoffs. In the 1/8 finals, quarter finals and semi-finals, each team will play two home and away games with its opponents. The promotion rules are the same as the qualifying stage and play-offs; the 1/8 finals are from teams in the same group and association. They will not meet, but starting from the quarter-finals this rule is no longer valid.
cerocup.rules_contont: The final will be decided by one game.

schedule.tips_text1: Score Format: Total score + penalty shootout score. The total score includes extra time score and penalty shootout score. For example, (5) 7 - 6 (4) represents a total score of 7-6, with a penalty shootout score of 5-4; the numbers in parentheses represent the penalty shootout score。
schedule.tips_text2: Small Circles Below Team Names: Represent penalty shootouts. Status: Blue dot for scored goals, red dot for missed goals, gray dot for not taken penalties. When the second round of penalty shootout occurs, the status of the dots here is also updated accordingly。
